name: 365Golf
about: 365Golf is an automated indoor golf simulator facility located in Louisville, Kentucky. It operates as a self-service driving range and simulation bay, allowing players to book time online, access the facility without staff, and use the simulators independently. The venue focuses on providing a convenient, no-wait golf experience through technology and smartphone reservations. With a set hourly rate and the option for membership packages, it caters to individuals looking for flexible practice or play opportunities on a premium golf simulator.
why_golfers_like_it: Fully automated experience with no waiting or staff required
State-of-the-art simulators with access to legendary golf courses
Real-time swing data and ball flight tracking for improvement
Flexible membership options for frequent players

food_and_drink.notes: No food is permitted inside the simulator area.
No alcohol is mentioned as being available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent them at the facility. If using your own, please ensure the club faces are clean.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink is permitted inside the simulator area.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for playing 18 holes, as sessions are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and kids, as it is described as a welcoming environment for all skill levels.
